projectDescription: A web-based rental management system for SMEs that handles inventory, rental checkout/returns, invoicing, reports, and role-based user access.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with four roles: Admin, Gerente, Vendedor, Bodeguero
Full inventory management (add, edit, delete, visualize products with stock alerts)
Rental lifecycle management: checkout with stock deduction and return with billing
Automatic document generation: remission notes (REM#####) and invoices (FVPA#####)
MongoDB Atlas synchronization with localStorage as offline-capable data layer
User registration with admin email approval workflow via Nodemailer
Inventory reports with KPIs, category breakdown, stock alerts, and top-5 by value
CSV export of complete rental and return history
Test/demo mode with isolated data storage to prevent production data contamination
Deployment on Vercel with Express.js backend
publicApiSurface: POST /api/exportar — Sync localStorage data to MongoDB Atlas
POST /api/login — Authenticate user with username, password, role
POST /api/registro — Register new user (triggers email approval flow)
GET /api/aprobar-usuario?token=... — Approve user via email token link
GET /api/rechazar-usuario?token=... — Reject user via email token link
POST /api/aprobar-usuario-id/:id — Approve user by MongoDB ObjectId
POST /api/rechazar-usuario-id/:id — Reject and delete user by MongoDB ObjectId
